result.stdout:
=== ADFS Authentication CLI ===
No parameters file found in the current directory.
Creating a template parameters file (.parameters) in the current directory...
✅ Parameters file created: /tmp/inspectra-help-adfsauthtool-1.0.1-6a5c66c324af41708c86d876600d804e/.parameters
Please edit this file with your ADFS credentials and configuration.
Description:
  ADFS Authentication CLI tool

Usage:
  AdfsAutomationUsage [command] [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbose   Enable verbose output for detailed debugging information
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  authenticate      Authenticate with ADFS and get tokens
  clear-cache       Clear cached tokens
  show-tokens       Show cached tokens if available
  show-credentials  Show the credentials that will be used for authentication
  show-token-file   Show tokens from a specific file

=== ADFS Authentication CLI ===
No parameters file found in the current directory.
Creating a template parameters file (.parameters) in the current directory...
✅ Parameters file created: /tmp/inspectra-help-adfsauthtool-1.0.1-6a5c66c324af41708c86d876600d804e/.parameters
Please edit this file with your ADFS credentials and configuration.
Description:
  ADFS Authentication CLI tool

Usage:
  AdfsAutomationUsage [command] [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbose   Enable verbose output for detailed debugging information
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  authenticate      Authenticate with ADFS and get tokens
  clear-cache       Clear cached tokens
  show-tokens       Show cached tokens if available
  show-credentials  Show the credentials that will be used for authentication
  show-token-file   Show tokens from a specific file

result.stdout:
=== ADFS Authentication CLI ===
Description:
  Authenticate with ADFS and get tokens

Usage:
  AdfsAutomationUsage authenticate [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbose                            Enable verbose output for detailed debugging information
  -p, --parameters-file <parameters-file>  Path to a custom parameters file containing credentials and configuration
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
=== ADFS Authentication CLI ===
Description:
  Show tokens from a specific file

Usage:
  AdfsAutomationUsage show-token-file [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbose             Enable verbose output for detailed debugging information
  --file <file> (REQUIRED)  Path to the token file
  -?, -h, --help            Show help and usage information
